# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
  - name: listener_http
    address:
      socket_address:
        address: 0.0.0.0
        port_value: 80
    filter_chains:
    - filters:
      - name: envoy.filters.listener.http_connection_manager
        typed_config:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
          stat_prefix: ingress_http
          route_config:
            name: local_route
            virtual_hosts:
            - name: backend
              domains:
              - "*"
              routes:
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/users"
                route:
                  cluster: users_service
                  timeout: 30s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/products"
                route:
                  cluster: products_service
                  timeout: 30s
              - match:
                  prefix: "/api/orders"
                route:
                  cluster: orders_service
                  timeout: 30s
          http_filters:
          - name: envoy.filters.http.router
            typed_config:
              "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router
  clusters:
  - name: users_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    health_checks:
    - http_health_check:
        path: "/health"
        timeout: 5s
        interval: 30s
        unhealthy_threshold: 2
        healthy_threshold: 2
    cluster_timeout:
      connect_timeout: 5s
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 10000
        max_retries: 3
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_probes: 3
        keepalive_time: 300
        keepalive_interval: 60
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: users_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: users-service
                port_value: 8080
  - name: products_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    health_checks:
    - http_health_check:
        path: "/health"
        timeout: 5s
        interval: 30s
        unhealthy_threshold: 2
        healthy_threshold: 2
    cluster_timeout:
      connect_timeout: 5s
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 10000
        max_retries: 3
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_probes: 3
        keepalive_time: 300
        keepalive_interval: 60
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: products_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: products-service
                port_value: 8080
  - name: orders_service
    connect_timeout: 5s
    type: LOGICAL_DNS
    lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
    dns_lookup_family: V4_ONLY
    health_checks:
    - http_health_check:
        path: "/health"
        timeout: 5s
        interval: 30s
        unhealthy_threshold: 2
        healthy_threshold: 2
    cluster_timeout:
      connect_timeout: 5s
    circuit_breakers:
      thresholds:
      - max_connections: 1000
        max_pending_requests: 1000
        max_requests: 10000
        max_retries: 3
    upstream_connection_options:
      tcp_keepalive:
        keepalive_probes: 3
        keepalive_time: 300
        keepalive_interval: 60
    load_assignment:
      cluster_name: orders_service
      endpoints:
      - lb_endpoints:
        - endpoint:
            address:
              socket_address:
                address: orders-service
                port_value: 8080
admin:
  access_log_path: /dev/null
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 8001
